scripts.build: npm run build -w @orbit-id/core && npm run build -w @orbit-id/typescript && npm run build -w @orbit-id/cli && npm run build -w @orbit-id/node-lease
scripts.test: npm run test -w @orbit-id/core && npm run test -w @orbit-id/typescript && npm run test -w @orbit-id/cli && npm run test -w @orbit-id/node-lease
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @orbit-id/core && npm run typecheck -w @orbit-id/typescript && npm run typecheck -w @orbit-id/cli && npm run typecheck -w @orbit-id/node-lease
